title: Seeds - The Big Three
text: Demand for fresh water is outrunning supply as the result of aquifer and reservoir depletion; farmers are having to cut back. At the same time, crops are coming under stress as the result of climate change / global warming and sustained droughts.

title: 5 Stocks to Watch in a Prospering Agriculture Operations Industry
text: The Agriculture - Operations industry looks well-placed for growth, driven by the solid demand for healthy and organic products amid challenging supply-chain conditions and high input costs. Players like ADM, CTVA, AGRO, CVGW and ALCO have placed themselves well.

title: Corteva: Extensive Data Analysis And Inorganic Growth Could Make The Stock Spike

title: Corteva sees 2022 sales above market expectations
text: Corteva Inc on Wednesday forecast 2022 sales above market expectations as the insecticide and seed maker benefited from strong demand and higher prices.
